file.content:
import useDarkMode from 'use-dark-mode'
import { ThemeProvider } from 'styled-components'
import { BrowserRouter as Router } from 'react-router-dom'
import { Provider as StoreProvider } from 'react-redux'

import { store } from './app-state'
import { AppRoutes } from './Routes'
import { lightTheme, darkTheme } from './styles/theme'
import { GlobalStyle } from './styles/GlobalStyle'

export default function App() {
  const { value } = useDarkMode(false, { global: globalThis.window })
  const theme = value ? darkTheme : lightTheme

  return (
    <Router>
      <StoreProvider store={store}>
        <ThemeProvider theme={theme}>
          <GlobalStyle />
          <AppRoutes />
        </ThemeProvider>
      </StoreProvider>
    </Router>
  )
}

content.content:
1→import { useLayoutEffect } from 'react'
     2→import { Routes, Route, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→
     4→import { CategoryListPage } from './pages/CategoryListPage'
     5→import { CategoryDetailPage } from './pages/CategoryDetailPage'
     6→import { RestaurantDetailPage } from './pages/RestaurantDetailPage'
     7→import { HomePage } from './pages/HomePage'
     8→import { CheckoutPage } from './pages/CheckoutPage'
     9→import { SuccessPage } from './pages/SuccessPage'
    10→
    11→export const AppRoutes: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<unknown>> = ({ children }) => {
    12→  const location = useLocation()
    13→  // Scroll to top when a path changes
    14→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    15→    window.scrollTo(0, 0)
    16→  }, [location.pathname])
    17→
    18→  return (
    19→    <>
    20→      <div id="modal" />
    21→      <Routes>
    22→        <Route path="/categories" element={<CategoryListPage />} />
    23→        <Route path="/categories/:id" element={<CategoryDetailPage />} />
    24→        <Route path="/restaurants/:id" element={<RestaurantDetailPage />} />
    25→        <Route path="/checkout" element={<CheckoutPage />} />
    26→        <Route path="/success" element={<SuccessPage />} />
    27→        <Route path="/" element={<HomePage />} />
    28→        {children}
    29→      </Routes>
    30→    </>
    31→  )
    32→}
    33→

file.content:
import { DefaultTheme } from 'styled-components'

declare module 'styled-components' {
  export interface DefaultTheme {
    name: 'light' | 'dark'
    fonts: {
      family: string
    }
    spacing: typeof spacing
    color: typeof color
    borderRadius: typeof borderRadius
    boxShadow: typeof boxShadow
    typography: typeof typography
  }
}

const baseColors = {
  white: '#FFFFFF ',
  black: '#202020',
  red: {
    base: '#D70808',
    light1: '#E57373',
    light2: '#EF9A9A',
    dark1: '#C62828',
    dark2: '#B71C1C',
  },
  otherBlack: '#2C2C2C ',
  grey: {
    base: '#909090',
    light1: '#A6A6A6',
    light2: '#BCBCBC',
    light3: '#D2D2D2',
    light4: '#E9E9E9',
    light5: '#F5F6F7',
    light6: '#F9F9F9',
    dark1: '#797979',
    dark2: '#636363',
    dark3: '#4D4D4D',
    dark4: '#363636',
    dark5: '#2C2C2C',
    dark6: '#202020',
  },
  green: {
    base: '#E5F8BC',
    light1: '#E8F9C3',
    light2: '#EAF9C9',
    light3: '#EDFAD0',
    light4: '#EFFBD7',
    light5: '#F2FCDE',
    dark1: '#CEDFA9',
    dark2: '#B7C696',
    dark3: '#A0AE84',
    dark4: '#899571',
    dark5: '#737C5E',
  },
  blue: {
    base: '#B1DDE4',
    light1: '#B9E0E7',
    light2: '#C1E4E9',
    light3: '#C8E7EC',
    light4: '#D0EBEF',
    light5: '#D8EEF2',
    dark1: '#9FC7CD',
    dark2: '#8EB1B6',
    dark3: '#7C9BA0',
    dark4: '#6A8589',
    dark5: '#596f72',
  },
}

const spaceUnit = 1

const borderRadius = {
  xs: '4px',
  s: '8px',
  m: '16px',
  l: '24px',
  xl: '32px',
  xxl: '40px',
  round: '50%',
}

const spacing = {
  xxs: `${0.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
  xs: `${0.5 * spaceUnit}em`,
  s: `${spaceUnit}em`,
  m: `${1.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
  l: `${2 * spaceUnit}em`,
  xl: `${3.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
  xxl: `${5.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
}

const boxShadow = {
  card: '0px 14px 26px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)',
  inner: 'inset 0 3px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)',
  outerBorder: `0 0 0 1px ${baseColors.blue.dark2}, 0 0 0 4px ${baseColors.blue.light5}`,
}

const typography = {
  fontSize: {
    body: '1.125rem',
    bodyS: '1rem',
    bodyXS: '0.9rem',
    bodyXXS: '0.72rem',
    heading1: '2.74rem',
    heading2: '2.19rem',
    heading3: '1.75rem',
    heading4: '1.4rem',
  },
  fontWeight: {
    black: '900',
    bold: '700',
    medium: '500',
    regular: '400',
  },
}

const color = {
  accentText: baseColors.black,
  badgeBackground: baseColors.grey.light4,
  badgeText: baseColors.grey.dark2,
  cartButtonText: baseColors.grey.base,
  bannerBackground: baseColors.blue.base,
  buttonClear: 'transparent',
  buttonClearHover: baseColors.grey.light5,
  buttonPrimary: baseColors.grey.dark6,
  buttonPrimaryHover: baseColors.grey.dark5, // recheck
  buttonSecondary: baseColors.green.base,
  buttonSecondaryHover: baseColors.green.dark1, // recheck
  buttonText: baseColors.white,
  cardBackground: baseColors.grey.light6,
  checkoutTopBackground: baseColors.green.base,
  checkoutBottomBackground: baseColors.grey.light6,
  error: baseColors.red.dark2,
  formBackground: baseColors.white,
  foodItemBackground: baseColors.white,
  footerBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
  headerBackground: baseColors.white,
  restaurantDetailBackground: baseColors.white,
  headerBorder: baseColors.grey.light4,
  inputBackground: baseColors.grey.light5,
  inputHint: baseColors.grey.dark1,
  inputIcon: baseColors.grey.dark6,
  label: baseColors.grey.dark4,
  labelActive: baseColors.grey.dark6,
  menuSectionBackground: baseColors.grey.light6,
  stepsIndicatorInnerBar: baseColors.grey.dark6,
  stepsIndicatorOuterBar: baseColors.grey.light5,
  orderSummaryBackground: baseColors.white,
  overlayBackground: baseColors.white,
  overlayHeader: baseColors.grey.light5,
  primaryText: baseColors.otherBlack,
  secondaryText: baseColors.grey.dark2,
  // This is just used to demo a11y violations, use it in the Review component
  bannerText: baseColors.blue.dark3,
  reviewText: baseColors.blue.dark5,
  screenBackground: baseColors.white,
  sidebarHeader: baseColors.grey.dark4,
  sidebarFooter: baseColors.white,
  skeletonBase: baseColors.grey.light4,
  skeletonHighlight: baseColors.grey.light5,
  topBannerBackground: baseColors.green.base,
  newRestaurantTag: baseColors.green.base,
  white: baseColors.white,
  black: baseColors.black,
}

export const lightTheme: DefaultTheme = {
  borderRadius,
  boxShadow,
  color,
  fonts: {
    family: 'NunitoSans, sans-serif',
  },
  name: 'light',
  spacing,
  typography,
}

export const darkTheme: DefaultTheme = {
  ...lightTheme,
  boxShadow: {
    ...boxShadow,
    outerBorder: `0 0 0 2px ${baseColors.blue.dark5}, 0 0 0 4px ${baseColors.blue.base}`,
  },
  color: {
    ...lightTheme.color,
    badgeBackground: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    badgeText: baseColors.grey.light1,
    cartButtonText: baseColors.grey.dark2,
    bannerBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    buttonClearHover: baseColors.grey.dark4, // recheck
    buttonPrimary: baseColors.green.base,
    buttonPrimaryHover: baseColors.green.dark1, // recheck
    buttonSecondary: baseColors.green.base,
    buttonText: baseColors.otherBlack,
    cardBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    checkoutTopBackground: baseColors.grey.dark6,
    checkoutBottomBackground: baseColors.grey.dark1,
    formBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    foodItemBackground: baseColors.otherBlack,
    headerBackground: baseColors.grey.dark6,
    restaurantDetailBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    headerBorder: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    inputBackground: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    inputIcon: baseColors.white,
    inputHint: baseColors.grey.light1,
    label: baseColors.grey.light4,
    labelActive: baseColors.white,
    menuSectionBackground: baseColors.grey.dark6,
    stepsIndicatorInnerBar: baseColors.green.base,
    stepsIndicatorOuterBar: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    orderSummaryBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    overlayBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    overlayHeader: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    primaryText: baseColors.white,
    reviewText: baseColors.blue.base,
    screenBackground: baseColors.grey.dark6,
    sidebarHeader: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    sidebarFooter: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    skeletonBase: baseColors.grey.dark3,
    skeletonHighlight: baseColors.grey.dark2,
    topBannerBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
  },
  name: 'dark',
}

1→import { combineReducers, configureStore } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'
     2→
     3→import { reducer as cart } from './cart'
     4→import { reducer as order } from './order'
     5→
     6→export const rootReducer = combineReducers({
     7→  cart,
     8→  order,
     9→})
    10→
    11→export const store = configureStore({
    12→  reducer: rootReducer,
    13→})
    14→
    15→export type AppDispatch = typeof store.dispatch
    16→export type RootState = ReturnType<typeof store.getState>
    17→

1→import { TypedUseSelectorHook, useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux'
     2→
     3→import { AppDispatch, RootState } from './store'
     4→
     5→/**
     6→ * The reason we expose our own dispatch and selector
     7→ * is that we get typescript safety anywhere, which is
     8→ * automatically updated as we add more slices to the application.
     9→ */
    10→
    11→export const useAppDispatch = () => useDispatch<AppDispatch>()
    12→export const useAppSelector: TypedUseSelectorHook<RootState> = useSelector
    13→

file.content:
import { TypedUseSelectorHook, useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux'

import { AppDispatch, RootState } from './store'

/**
 * The reason we expose our own dispatch and selector
 * is that we get typescript safety anywhere, which is
 * automatically updated as we add more slices to the application.
 */

export const useAppDispatch = () => useDispatch<AppDispatch>()
export const useAppSelector: TypedUseSelectorHook<RootState> = useSelector

import { Restaurant } from '../types'

const food = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: 'Cheeseburger',
    description: 'Nice grilled burger with cheese',
    price: 8.5,

  {

    price: 2.5,
  },
]

const dessert = [

    description: 'Ice cream',
    price: 2,

]

export const restaurants = restaurantsCompleteData.map((restaurant) => {

  return {
    ...rest,

})

1→import styled from 'styled-components'
     2→import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→import Carousel, { type ArrowProps, type CarouselProps } from 'react-multi-carousel'
     4→
     5→import { useFetchRestaurants } from '../../../../api/hooks'
     6→import { IconButton } from '../../../../components/IconButton'
     7→import { PageSection } from '../../../../components/PageSection'
     8→import { RestaurantCard, RestaurantCardSkeleton } from '../../../../components/RestaurantCard'
     9→import { Restaurant } from '../../../../types'
    10→import { isMobile } from '../../../../helpers'
    11→
    12→const PreviousButton = styled(IconButton)`
    13→  position: absolute;
    14→  left: 0;
    15→`
    16→
    17→const NextButton = styled(IconButton)`
    18→  position: absolute;
    19→  right: 0;
    20→`
    21→
    22→type RestaurantsSectionProps = {
    23→  title: string
    24→}
    25→
    26→const CustomArrow = (props: Partial<CarouselProps & ArrowProps> & { isNext?: boolean }) => {
    27→  // filter out unnecessary props coming from react-multi-carousel
    28→  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars
    29→  const { carouselState, rtl, isNext, ...rest } = props
    30→  return isNext ? (
    31→    <NextButton name="arrow-right" {...rest} />
    32→  ) : (
    33→    <PreviousButton name="arrow-left" {...rest} />
    34→  )
    35→}
    36→
    37→export const RestaurantsSection = ({ title }: RestaurantsSectionProps) => {
    38→  const navigate = useNavigate()
    39→
    40→  const { restaurants, status } = useFetchRestaurants()
    41→
    42→  const isOnMobile = isMobile()
    43→  return (
    44→    <PageSection title={title}>
    45→      <Carousel
    46→        draggable={isOnMobile}
    47→        partialVisible={isOnMobile}
    48→        customLeftArrow={<CustomArrow />}
    49→        customRightArrow={<CustomArrow isNext />}
    50→        responsive={{
    51→          desktop: {
    52→            breakpoint: { max: 5000, min: 1024 },
    53→            items: 3,
    54→            slidesToSlide: 3,
    55→          },
    56→          tablet: {
    57→            breakpoint: { max: 1024, min: 464 },
    58→            items: 2,
    59→            paritialVisibilityGutter: 50,
    60→          },
    61→          mobile: {
    62→            breakpoint: { max: 464, min: 0 },
    63→            items: 1,
    64→            paritialVisibilityGutter: 30,
    65→          },
    66→        }}
    67→        containerClass="carousel-container"
    68→        removeArrowOnDeviceType={['tablet', 'mobile']}
    69→        itemClass="carousel-item"
    70→      >
    71→        {status === 'loading'
    72→          ? Array.from({ length: 3 }).map((_, index) => <RestaurantCardSkeleton key={index} />)
    73→          : restaurants.map((restaurant: Restaurant, index: number) => (
    74→              <RestaurantCard
    75→                key={restaurant.name + index}
    76→                {...restaurant}
    77→                onClick={() => navigate(`/restaurants/${restaurant.id}`)}
    78→              />
    79→            ))}
    80→      </Carousel>
    81→    </PageSection>
    82→  )
    83→}
    84→

    17→  children,

1→import * as React from 'react'
     2→import styled, { css } from 'styled-components'
     3→
     4→type FontSize = 'body' | 'bodyS' | 'bodyXS' | 'bodyXXS'
     5→type FontWeight = 'regular' | 'medium' | 'bold' | 'black'
     6→
     7→type StyledBodyProps = {
     8→  $size: string
     9→  $fontWeight: string
    10→}
    11→
    12→const BodyBase = styled.p<StyledBodyProps>(
    13→  ({ $size, $fontWeight, color: textColor, theme: { typography, color } }) => css`
    14→    display: block;
    15→    font-family: 'Hind';
    16→    color: ${textColor || color.primaryText};
    17→    font-weight: ${typography.fontWeight[$fontWeight as FontWeight]};
    18→    font-size: ${typography.fontSize[`body${$size}` as FontSize]};
    19→  `
    20→)
    21→
    22→type AsElement = 'span' | 'p' | 'label' | 'figcaption'
    23→
    24→type ElementProps<T extends AsElement> = T extends 'label'
    25→  ? React.LabelHTMLAttributes<HTMLLabelElement>
    26→  : T extends 'span'
    27→    ? React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement>
    28→    : T extends 'p'
    29→      ? React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>
    30→      : React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>
    31→
    32→type DefaultProps = {
    33→  className?: string
    34→  size?: 'S' | 'XS' | 'XXS'
    35→  fontWeight?: 'regular' | 'medium' | 'bold' | 'black'
    36→  type?: AsElement
    37→  color?: string
    38→  children: React.ReactNode | string
    39→}
    40→
    41→type BodyProps = DefaultProps & ElementProps<AsElement>
    42→
    43→export const Body: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<BodyProps>> = ({
    44→  size = '',
    45→  fontWeight = 'regular',
    46→  type = 'p',
    47→  color,
    48→  children,
    49→  className,
    50→  ...props
    51→}) => (
    52→  <BodyBase
    53→    as={type}
    54→    $size={size}
    55→    $fontWeight={fontWeight}
    56→    color={color}
    57→    className={className}
    58→    {...props}
    59→  >
    60→    {children}
    61→  </BodyBase>
    62→)
    63→

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→export const useKey = (key: string, keyDownCb = () => {}, keyUpCb = () => {}): boolean => {
     4→  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false)
     5→  const match = useCallback((event: any) => key.toLowerCase() === event.key.toLowerCase(), [key])
     6→
     7→  const onKeyDown = useCallback(
     8→    (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
     9→      if (match(event)) {
    10→        setPressed(true)
    11→        keyDownCb()
    12→      }
    13→    },
    14→    [keyDownCb, match]
    15→  )
    16→
    17→  const onKeyUp = useCallback(
    18→    (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
    19→      if (match(event)) {
    20→        setPressed(false)
    21→        keyUpCb()
    22→      }
    23→    },
    24→    [keyUpCb, match]
    25→  )
    26→
    27→  useEffect(() => {
    28→    globalThis.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    29→    globalThis.addEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp)
    30→
    31→    return () => {
    32→      globalThis.removeEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    33→      globalThis.removeEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp)
    34→    }
    35→  }, [key, onKeyDown, onKeyUp])
    36→
    37→  return pressed
    38→}
    39→

    27→  },
    28→})
    29→

    36→// Export the reducer, either as a default or named export
    37→export default reducer

Perfect! Now let me compile all the information into a comprehensive report.

## Comprehensive Codebase Overview

I've thoroughly explored the codebase and here's a complete understanding of all components, pages, hooks, and state management:

---

### **PAGE COMPONENTS** (in `/src/pages/`)

#### **1. HomePage**
- **Files**: `index.tsx`, `HomePage.tsx`
- **Props**: None (container component)
- **Renders**: `PageTemplate` with Banner, RestaurantsSection, AwardWinningSection, CategoriesSection
- **Key Features**: Home page layout with sections

#### **2. CategoryListPage**
- **Files**: `index.tsx`, `CategoryListPage.tsx`
- **Props**: None (uses router params)
- **Renders**: List of categories from `/stub/categories`
- **Components Used**: `TopBanner`, `CategoryList`, typography

#### **3. CategoryDetailPage**
- **Files**: `index.tsx`, `CategoryDetailPage.tsx`
- **Props**: None (uses `useParams` for category id)
- **Renders**: Restaurant cards filtered by category using `useFetchRestaurantsByCategory` hook
- **State**: Uses Redux for cart management
- **Features**: Breadcrumb, error handling, loading skeletons

#### **4. RestaurantDetailPage**
- **Files**: `index.tsx`, `RestaurantDetailPage.tsx`
- **Props**: None (uses router params for restaurant id)
- **Renders**: Restaurant details with food sections (FoodItem, Dessert, Drinks)
- **State Management**: Redux cart (add/remove items)
- **Modal**: `FoodItemModal` for quantity selection
- **Error States**: 404, 500 error handling

#### **5. CheckoutPage**
- **Files**: `index.tsx`, `CheckoutPage.tsx`
- **Props**: None
- **Renders**: `MultiStepForm` + `OrderSummary`
- **Features**: Two-column layout with form on left, order summary on right

#### **6. SuccessPage**
- **Files**: `index.tsx`, `SuccessPage.tsx`
- **Props**: None (uses Redux `selectOrderItems`)
- **Renders**: Order confirmation with estimated delivery time and order summary

---

### **CORE COMPONENTS** (in `/src/components/`)

#### **Button**
```tsx
Props:
  - clear?: boolean (transparent style)
  - round?: boolean (fully rounded)
  - large?: boolean (larger padding)
  - icon?: IconName (renders icon)
  - iconSize?: number
  - disabled?: boolean
  - onClick?: () => void
  - children?: string | ReactNode
```

#### **Badge**
```tsx
Props:
  - text: string (required)
  - className?: string
```

#### **Modal**
```tsx
Props:
  - isOpen: boolean (required)
  - onClose: () => void (required)
  - children: ReactNode
Uses: Portal, CSSTransition, keyboard (escape key)
```

#### **Sidebar**
```tsx
Props:
  - isOpen: boolean (required)
  - title: string (required)
  - onClose: () => void (required)
  - footer?: ReactNode
Features: Escape key support, body scroll lock
```

#### **Header**
- **Two Implementations**:
  1. `HeaderComponent` (presentational) - takes all props
  2. `Header` (container) - connects to Redux, handles navigation
```tsx
Props:
  - isCartVisible?: boolean
  - cartItems?: CartItem[]
  - totalPrice?: number
  - logoOnly?: boolean
  - sticky?: boolean
  - toggleCartVisibility?: () => void
  - goToCheckout?: () => void
  - saveItem?: (item: CartItem) => void
```

#### **Footer**
- Static footer with links, social media, app store badges

#### **RestaurantCard**
```tsx
Props:
  - name: string (required)
  - specialty: string (required)
  - photoUrl: string (required)
  - rating?: number
  - categories?: string[]
  - isClosed?: boolean
  - isNew?: boolean
  - onClick?: () => void
  - className?: string
Includes: RestaurantCardSkeleton for loading
```

#### **Category**
```tsx
Props:
  - title: string (required)
  - photoUrl: string (required)
  - id?: string
  - round?: boolean (changes layout - circular vs square)
```

#### **TopBanner**
```tsx
Props:
  - title?: string
  - photoUrl?: string (background image)
  - onBackClick?: () => void (currently commented out)
```

#### **ShoppingCart Components**
- **OrderSummary**: Displays cart items total
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - cartItems: CartItem[]
  ```
- **ShoppingCartItem**: Individual cart line item
- **ShoppingCartMenu**: Sidebar with cart items and checkout button
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - isOpen: boolean
    - totalPrice: number
    - onClose: () => void
    - cartItems: CartItem[]
    - onGoToCheckoutClick?: () => void
    - onItemChange: (item: any) => void
  ```

#### **Breadcrumb**
```tsx
Props:
  - items: Array<{ label: string, path?: string }>
```

#### **Review**
```tsx
Props:
  - rating?: number
Shows: Star rating with text (Very poor -> Excellent)
```

#### **Typography**
- **Heading**:
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - level?: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 (maps to h1-h5)
    - className?: string
    - children: ReactNode
  ```
- **Body**:
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - type?: 'span' | 'p' | 'label' | 'figcaption'
    - size?: 'S' | 'XS' | 'XXS'
    - fontWeight?: 'regular' | 'medium' | 'bold' | 'black'
    - color?: string
    - className?: string
    - children: ReactNode | string
  ```

#### **Forms**
- **Input**:
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - label?: string
    - value?: any
    - onChange?: (data: any) => void
    - error?: string
    - [HTMLInputAttributes]
  ```
- **Select**:
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - label?: string
    - options: any[] (required)
    - value?: any
    - onChange?: (data: any) => void
    - [HTMLSelectAttributes]
  ```

#### **Other Components**
- **PageSection**: Section with title and optional top button
- **Spinner**: Loading spinner
- **Logo**: Animated food logo with optional text "MealDrop"
- **ErrorBlock**: Error message with image and action button
- **AnimatedIllustration**: Loads Lottie animations (NotFound, Error)
- **IconButton**: Circular button with icon
- **Icon**: SVG icon renderer (uses sprite map)
- **FooterCard**: Card for footer with title and links
- **Portal**: React portal component for modals/sidebars

---

### **PAGE-SPECIFIC COMPONENTS**

#### **HomePage Sections**
- **Banner**: Hero section with "Hungry?" CTA
- **RestaurantsSection**: Carousel of restaurant cards
- **CategoriesSection**: Carousel of category cards
- **AwardWinningSection**: Award winning restaurants promo

#### **RestaurantDetailPage Components**
- **FoodItem**: Individual menu item card
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - name: string
    - price: number
    - description?: string
    - quantity?: number
    - onClick: () => void
  ```
- **FoodSection**: Grid of food items by category
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - title: string
    - items: FoodMenuItem[]
    - cartItems: CartItem[]
    - onItemClick?: (item: CartItem) => void
  ```
- **FoodItemModal**: Modal for selecting food quantity
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - item?: CartItem
    - cartItems: CartItem[]
    - onClose: () => void
    - onItemSave: (item: CartItem) => void
    - onItemRemove: (item: CartItem) => void
  ```

#### **CheckoutPage Components**
- **MultiStepForm**: Multi-step checkout form
- **StepIndicator**: Shows current checkout step
- **ContactDetails**: Email/phone form
- **DeliveryDetails**: Address form
- **Validation**: Form validation logic

#### **CategoryListPage Components**
- **CategoryList**: Grid of all categories

---

### **HOOKS** (in `/src/hooks/`)

```tsx
export const useKey = (key: string, keyDownCb?: () => {}, keyUpCb?: () => {}): boolean
// Detects keyboard press, used for Escape key handling

export const useLockBodyScroll = (shouldLock?: boolean): void
// Locks/unlocks body scroll when modals/sidebars open
```

---

### **TYPES** (in `/src/types/index.ts`)

```tsx
export type ShopItem = {
  id: number
  name: string
  price: number
  imageUrl?: string
  description?: string
}

export type FoodMenuItem = {
  id: number
  name: string
  description?: string
  price: number
}

export type Restaurant = {
  name: string
  id?: string
  mapsUrl?: string
  rating?: number
  url?: string
  address?: string
  specialty: string
  photoUrl: string
  isClosed?: boolean
  categories?: string[]
  isLoading?: boolean
  isNew?: boolean
  menu: {
    food: FoodMenuItem[]
    dessert: FoodMenuItem[]
    drinks: FoodMenuItem[]
  }
}
```

---

### **STATE MANAGEMENT** (Redux in `/src/app-state/`)

#### **Cart Slice** (`cart/cart.ts`)
```tsx
export interface CartItem extends ShopItem {
  quantity: number
}

export type CartState = {
  visible: boolean
  items: CartItem[]
}

Actions:
- toggleVisibilityAction()
- saveItemAction(item: CartItem)
- clearItemAction(item: CartItem)
- removeItemAction(item: CartItem)
- clearCartAction()
```

#### **Cart Selectors** (`cart/selectors.ts`)
```tsx
selectCartVisibility: boolean
selectCartItems: CartItem[]
selectCartItemsCount: number
selectCartTotal: number
```

#### **Order Slice** (`order/order.ts`)
```tsx
export type OrderState = {
  items: CartItem[]
}

Actions:
- saveOrderAction(items: CartItem[])
- clearOrderAction()
```

#### **Order Selectors** (`order/selectors.ts`)
```tsx
selectOrderItems: CartItem[]
selectOrderTotal: number
```

#### **App Hooks** (`hooks.ts`)
```tsx
export const useAppDispatch = () => useDispatch<AppDispatch>()
export const useAppSelector: TypedUseSelectorHook<RootState> = useSelector
```

---

### **EXISTING STORY FILES**

Located in `/src/stories/`:
- **Button.stories.ts**: Example stories for Button component (Primary, Secondary, Large, Small variants)
- **Header.stories.ts**: Example stories for Header (LoggedIn, LoggedOut)
- **Page.stories.ts**: Example stories for Page component with interaction testing

These use Storybook v7+ format with:
- Meta export with title, component, tags, parameters
- Story exports as named constants
- fn() spy wrapper for event handlers
- play() function for interaction testing

---

### **COMPONENT STRUCTURE SUMMARY**

**Total Components**: 40+ components across the application

**Key Patterns**:
1. Most components have both `Component.tsx` and `index.tsx` exports
2. Styled-components used throughout for styling
3. Memoization used on frequently rendered items (FoodItem, FoodSection)
4. Portal pattern for modals/sidebars
5. Redux for global cart and order state
6. React Router for navigation
7. TypeScript interfaces for all props
8. Keyboard event handling (Escape key)
9. Body scroll locking for overlays
10. Skeleton loading states (RestaurantCardSkeleton)

---

This is the complete architectural understanding of the codebase with all component props, imports, and rendering logic documented.

- **Features**: Breadcrumb, error handling, loading skeletons

#### **4. RestaurantDetailPage**
- **Files**: `index.tsx`, `RestaurantDetailPage.tsx`
- **Props**: None (uses router params for restaurant id)
- **Renders**: Restaurant details with food sections (FoodItem, Dessert, Drinks)
- **State Management**: Redux cart (add/remove items)
- **Modal**: `FoodItemModal` for quantity selection
- **Error States**: 404, 500 error handling

#### **5. CheckoutPage**
- **Files**: `index.tsx`, `CheckoutPage.tsx`
- **Props**: None
- **Renders**: `MultiStepForm` + `OrderSummary`
- **Features**: Two-column layout with form on left, order summary on right

#### **6. SuccessPage**
- **Files**: `index.tsx`, `SuccessPage.tsx`
- **Props**: None (uses Redux `selectOrderItems`)
- **Renders**: Order confirmation with estimated delivery time and order summary

---

### **CORE COMPONENTS** (in `/src/components/`)

#### **Button**
```tsx
Props:
  - clear?: boolean (transparent style)
  - round?: boolean (fully rounded)
  - large?: boolean (larger padding)
  - icon?: IconName (renders icon)
  - iconSize?: number
  - disabled?: boolean
  - onClick?: () => void
  - children?: string | ReactNode
```

#### **Badge**
```tsx
Props:
  - text: string (required)
  - className?: string
```

#### **Modal**
```tsx
Props:
  - isOpen: boolean (required)
  - onClose: () => void (required)
  - children: ReactNode
Uses: Portal, CSSTransition, keyboard (escape key)
```

#### **Sidebar**
```tsx
Props:
  - isOpen: boolean (required)
  - title: string (required)
  - onClose: () => void (required)
  - footer?: ReactNode
Features: Escape key support, body scroll lock
```

#### **Header**
- **Two Implementations**:
  1. `HeaderComponent` (presentational) - takes all props
  2. `Header` (container) - connects to Redux, handles navigation
```tsx
Props:
  - isCartVisible?: boolean
  - cartItems?: CartItem[]
  - totalPrice?: number
  - logoOnly?: boolean
  - sticky?: boolean
  - toggleCartVisibility?: () => void
  - goToCheckout?: () => void
  - saveItem?: (item: CartItem) => void
```

#### **Footer**
- Static footer with links, social media, app store badges

#### **RestaurantCard**
```tsx
Props:
  - name: string (required)
  - specialty: string (required)
  - photoUrl: string (required)
  - rating?: number
  - categories?: string[]
  - isClosed?: boolean
  - isNew?: boolean
  - onClick?: () => void
  - className?: string
Includes: RestaurantCardSkeleton for loading
```

#### **Category**
```tsx
Props:
  - title: string (required)
  - photoUrl: string (required)
  - id?: string
  - round?: boolean (changes layout - circular vs square)
```

#### **TopBanner**
```tsx
Props:
  - title?: string
  - photoUrl?: string (background image)
  - onBackClick?: () => void (currently commented out)
```

#### **ShoppingCart Components**
- **OrderSummary**: Displays cart items total
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - cartItems: CartItem[]
  ```
- **ShoppingCartItem**: Individual cart line item
- **ShoppingCartMenu**: Sidebar with cart items and checkout button
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - isOpen: boolean
    - totalPrice: number
    - onClose: () => void
    - cartItems: CartItem[]
    - onGoToCheckoutClick?: () => void
    - onItemChange: (item: any) => void
  ```

#### **Breadcrumb**
```tsx
Props:
  - items: Array<{ label: string, path?: string }>
```

#### **Review**
```tsx
Props:
  - rating?: number
Shows: Star rating with text (Very poor -> Excellent)
```

#### **Typography**
- **Heading**:
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - level?: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 (maps to h1-h5)
    - className?: string
    - children: ReactNode
  ```
- **Body**:
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - type?: 'span' | 'p' | 'label' | 'figcaption'
    - size?: 'S' | 'XS' | 'XXS'
    - fontWeight?: 'regular' | 'medium' | 'bold' | 'black'
    - color?: string
    - className?: string
    - children: ReactNode | string
  ```

#### **Forms**
- **Input**:
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - label?: string
    - value?: any
    - onChange?: (data: any) => void
    - error?: string
    - [HTMLInputAttributes]
  ```
- **Select**:
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - label?: string
    - options: any[] (required)
    - value?: any
    - onChange?: (data: any) => void
    - [HTMLSelectAttributes]
  ```

#### **Other Components**
- **PageSection**: Section with title and optional top button
- **Spinner**: Loading spinner
- **Logo**: Animated food logo with optional text "MealDrop"
- **ErrorBlock**: Error message with image and action button
- **AnimatedIllustration**: Loads Lottie animations (NotFound, Error)
- **IconButton**: Circular button with icon
- **Icon**: SVG icon renderer (uses sprite map)
- **FooterCard**: Card for footer with title and links
- **Portal**: React portal component for modals/sidebars

---

### **PAGE-SPECIFIC COMPONENTS**

#### **HomePage Sections**
- **Banner**: Hero section with "Hungry?" CTA
- **RestaurantsSection**: Carousel of restaurant cards
- **CategoriesSection**: Carousel of category cards
- **AwardWinningSection**: Award winning restaurants promo

#### **RestaurantDetailPage Components**
- **FoodItem**: Individual menu item card
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - name: string
    - price: number
    - description?: string
    - quantity?: number
    - onClick: () => void
  ```
- **FoodSection**: Grid of food items by category
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - title: string
    - items: FoodMenuItem[]
    - cartItems: CartItem[]
    - onItemClick?: (item: CartItem) => void
  ```
- **FoodItemModal**: Modal for selecting food quantity
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - item?: CartItem
    - cartItems: CartItem[]
    - onClose: () => void
    - onItemSave: (item: CartItem) => void
    - onItemRemove: (item: CartItem) => void
  ```

#### **CheckoutPage Components**
- **MultiStepForm**: Multi-step checkout form
- **StepIndicator**: Shows current checkout step
- **ContactDetails**: Email/phone form
- **DeliveryDetails**: Address form
- **Validation**: Form validation logic

#### **CategoryListPage Components**
- **CategoryList**: Grid of all categories

---

### **HOOKS** (in `/src/hooks/`)

```tsx
export const useKey = (key: string, keyDownCb?: () => {}, keyUpCb?: () => {}): boolean
// Detects keyboard press, used for Escape key handling

export const useLockBodyScroll = (shouldLock?: boolean): void
// Locks/unlocks body scroll when modals/sidebars open
```

---

### **TYPES** (in `/src/types/index.ts`)

```tsx
export type ShopItem = {
  id: number
  name: string
  price: number
  imageUrl?: string
  description?: string
}

export type FoodMenuItem = {
  id: number
  name: string
  description?: string
  price: number
}

export type Restaurant = {
  name: string
  id?: string
  mapsUrl?: string
  rating?: number
  url?: string
  address?: string
  specialty: string
  photoUrl: string
  isClosed?: boolean
  categories?: string[]
  isLoading?: boolean
  isNew?: boolean
  menu: {
    food: FoodMenuItem[]
    dessert: FoodMenuItem[]
    drinks: FoodMenuItem[]
  }
}
```

---

### **STATE MANAGEMENT** (Redux in `/src/app-state/`)

#### **Cart Slice** (`cart/cart.ts`)
```tsx
export interface CartItem extends ShopItem {
  quantity: number
}

export type CartState = {
  visible: boolean
  items: CartItem[]
}

Actions:
- toggleVisibilityAction()
- saveItemAction(item: CartItem)
- clearItemAction(item: CartItem)
- removeItemAction(item: CartItem)
- clearCartAction()
```

#### **Cart Selectors** (`cart/selectors.ts`)
```tsx
selectCartVisibility: boolean
selectCartItems: CartItem[]
selectCartItemsCount: number
selectCartTotal: number
```

#### **Order Slice** (`order/order.ts`)
```tsx
export type OrderState = {
  items: CartItem[]
}

Actions:
- saveOrderAction(items: CartItem[])
- clearOrderAction()
```

#### **Order Selectors** (`order/selectors.ts`)
```tsx
selectOrderItems: CartItem[]
selectOrderTotal: number
```

#### **App Hooks** (`hooks.ts`)
```tsx
export const useAppDispatch = () => useDispatch<AppDispatch>()
export const useAppSelector: TypedUseSelectorHook<RootState> = useSelector
```

---

### **EXISTING STORY FILES**

Located in `/src/stories/`:
- **Button.stories.ts**: Example stories for Button component (Primary, Secondary, Large, Small variants)
- **Header.stories.ts**: Example stories for Header (LoggedIn, LoggedOut)
- **Page.stories.ts**: Example stories for Page component with interaction testing

These use Storybook v7+ format with:
- Meta export with title, component, tags, parameters
- Story exports as named constants
- fn() spy wrapper for event handlers
- play() function for interaction testing

---

### **COMPONENT STRUCTURE SUMMARY**

**Total Components**: 40+ components across the application

**Key Patterns**:
1. Most components have both `Component.tsx` and `index.tsx` exports
2. Styled-components used throughout for styling
3. Memoization used on frequently rendered items (FoodItem, FoodSection)
4. Portal pattern for modals/sidebars
5. Redux for global cart and order state
6. React Router for navigation
7. TypeScript interfaces for all props
8. Keyboard event handling (Escape key)
9. Body scroll locking for overlays
10. Skeleton loading states (RestaurantCardSkeleton)

---

This is the complete architectural understanding of the codebase with all component props, imports, and rendering logic documented.

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import type { Restaurant } from '../types'
     4→
     5→import { api } from './index'
     6→
     7→export const useFetchRestaurants = () => {
     8→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
     9→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    10→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    11→
    12→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    13→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    14→  }, [setRetry])
    15→
    16→  useEffect(() => {
    17→    setStatus('loading')
    18→
    19→    api
    20→      .getRestaurants()
    21→      .then((res) => {
    22→        setStatus('success')
    23→        setRestaurants(res)
    24→      })
    25→      .catch((error) => {
    26→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    27→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    28→      })
    29→  }, [retry])
    30→
    31→  return {
    32→    status,
    33→    restaurants,
    34→    retryRequest,
    35→  }
    36→}
    37→
    38→export const useFetchRestaurantsByCategory = (categoryId?: string) => {
    39→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    40→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    41→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    42→
    43→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    44→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    45→  }, [setRetry])
    46→
    47→  useEffect(() => {
    48→    if (categoryId) {
    49→      setStatus('loading')
    50→
    51→      api
    52→        .getRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId)
    53→        .then((res) => {
    54→          setStatus('success')
    55→          setRestaurants(res)
    56→        })
    57→        .catch((error) => {
    58→          const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    59→          setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    60→        })
    61→    }
    62→  }, [categoryId, retry])
    63→
    64→  return {
    65→    status,
    66→    restaurants,
    67→    retryRequest,
    68→  }
    69→}
    70→
    71→export const useFetchRestaurant = (id: string) => {
    72→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    73→  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant>()
    74→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    75→
    76→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    77→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    78→  }, [setRetry])
    79→
    80→  useEffect(() => {
    81→    setStatus('loading')
    82→
    83→    api
    84→      .getRestaurantById(id)
    85→      .then((res) => {
    86→        setStatus('success')
    87→        setRestaurant(res)
    88→      })
    89→      .catch((error) => {
    90→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    91→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    92→      })
    93→  }, [id, retry])
    94→
    95→  return {
    96→    status,
    97→    restaurant,
    98→    retryRequest,
    99→  }

import styled, { useTheme } from 'styled-components'

const StyledSVG = styled.svg`
  width: 100px;
  height: 100px;
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  bottom: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
`

export const Spinner = () => {
  const { color } = useTheme()
  return (
    <StyledSVG
      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
      viewBox="0 0 100 100"
      preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid"
    >
      <text transform="translate(-50 0)" fill={color.primaryText}>
        Looking for some food...
      </text>
      <animate attributeName="opacity" dur="1s" keyTimes="0;0.4;1" values="0;0;1" />
      <g>
        <circle cx="60" cy="50" r="4" fill="#22aca7">
          <animate
            attributeName="cx"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="95;35"
            keyTimes="0;1"
            begin="-0.6566000000000001s"
          />
          <animate
            attributeName="fill-opacity"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0;1;1"
            keyTimes="0;0.2;1"
            begin="-0.6566000000000001s"
          />
        </circle>
        <circle cx="60" cy="50" r="4" fill="#22aca7">
          <animate
            attributeName="cx"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="95;35"
            keyTimes="0;1"
            begin="-0.3234s"
          />
          <animate
            attributeName="fill-opacity"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0;1;1"
            keyTimes="0;0.2;1"
            begin="-0.3234s"
          />
        </circle>
        <circle cx="60" cy="50" r="4" fill="#22aca7">
          <animate
            attributeName="cx"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="95;35"
            keyTimes="0;1"
            begin="0s"
          />
          <animate
            attributeName="fill-opacity"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0;1;1"
            keyTimes="0;0.2;1"
            begin="0s"
          />
        </circle>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(-15 0)">
        <path d="M50 50L20 50A30 30 0 0 0 80 50Z" fill="#61d8de" transform="rotate(90 50 50)" />
        <path d="M50 50L20 50A30 30 0 0 0 80 50Z" fill="#61d8de">
          <animateTransform
            attributeName="transform"
            type="rotate"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0 50 50;45 50 50;0 50 50"
            keyTimes="0;0.5;1"
          />
        </path>
        <path d="M50 50L20 50A30 30 0 0 1 80 50Z" fill="#61d8de">
          <animateTransform
            attributeName="transform"
            type="rotate"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0 50 50;-45 50 50;0 50 50"
            keyTimes="0;0.5;1"
          />
        </path>
      </g>
    </StyledSVG>
  )
}

1→import styled from 'styled-components'
     2→import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→import Carousel, { type ArrowProps, type CarouselProps } from 'react-multi-carousel'
     4→
     5→import { useFetchRestaurants } from '../../../../api/hooks'
     6→import { IconButton } from '../../../../components/IconButton'
     7→import { PageSection } from '../../../../components/PageSection'
     8→import { RestaurantCard, RestaurantCardSkeleton } from '../../../../components/RestaurantCard'
     9→import { Restaurant } from '../../../../types'
    10→import { isMobile } from '../../../../helpers'
    11→
    12→const PreviousButton = styled(IconButton)`
    13→  position: absolute;
    14→  left: 0;
    15→`
    16→
    17→const NextButton = styled(IconButton)`
    18→  position: absolute;
    19→  right: 0;
    20→`
    21→
    22→type RestaurantsSectionProps = {
    23→  title: string
    24→}
    25→
    26→const CustomArrow = (props: Partial<CarouselProps & ArrowProps> & { isNext?: boolean }) => {
    27→  // filter out unnecessary props coming from react-multi-carousel
    28→  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars
    29→  const { carouselState, rtl, isNext, ...rest } = props
    30→  return isNext ? (
    31→    <NextButton name="arrow-right" {...rest} />
    32→  ) : (
    33→    <PreviousButton name="arrow-left" {...rest} />
    34→  )
    35→}
    36→
    37→export const RestaurantsSection = ({ title }: RestaurantsSectionProps) => {
    38→  const navigate = useNavigate()
    39→
    40→  const { restaurants, status } = useFetchRestaurants()
    41→
    42→  const isOnMobile = isMobile()
    43→  return (
    44→    <PageSection title={title}>
    45→      <Carousel
    46→        draggable={isOnMobile}
    47→        partialVisible={isOnMobile}
    48→        customLeftArrow={<CustomArrow />}
    49→        customRightArrow={<CustomArrow isNext />}
    50→        responsive={{
    51→          desktop: {
    52→            breakpoint: { max: 5000, min: 1024 },
    53→            items: 3,
    54→            slidesToSlide: 3,
    55→          },
    56→          tablet: {
    57→            breakpoint: { max: 1024, min: 464 },
    58→            items: 2,
    59→            paritialVisibilityGutter: 50,
    60→          },
    61→          mobile: {
    62→            breakpoint: { max: 464, min: 0 },
    63→            items: 1,
    64→            paritialVisibilityGutter: 30,
    65→          },
    66→        }}
    67→        containerClass="carousel-container"
    68→        removeArrowOnDeviceType={['tablet', 'mobile']}
    69→        itemClass="carousel-item"
    70→      >
    71→        {status === 'loading'
    72→          ? Array.from({ length: 3 }).map((_, index) => <RestaurantCardSkeleton key={index} />)
    73→          : restaurants.map((restaurant: Restaurant, index: number) => (
    74→              <RestaurantCard
    75→                key={restaurant.name + index}
    76→                {...restaurant}
    77→                onClick={() => navigate(`/restaurants/${restaurant.id}`)}
    78→              />
    79→            ))}
    80→      </Carousel>
    81→    </PageSection>
    82→  )
    83→}
    84→

1→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { ShoppingCartItem } from '../ShoppingCartItem/ShoppingCartItem'
     4→import { CartItem } from '../../../app-state/cart'
     5→import { Body } from '../../typography/Body'
     6→import { toCurrency } from '../../../helpers'
     7→
     8→import {
     9→  OrderSummaryContainer,
    10→  BottomContainer,
    11→  CartItemsContainer,
    12→  StyledHeading,
    13→} from './OrderSummary.styles'
    14→
    15→type OrderSummaryProps = {
    16→  cartItems: CartItem[]
    17→}
    18→
    19→export const OrderSummary = ({ cartItems }: OrderSummaryProps) => {
    20→  const totalPrice = useMemo(
    21→    () => cartItems.map((item) => item.quantity * item.price).reduce((acc, next) => acc + next, 0),
    22→    [cartItems]
    23→  )
    24→  return (
    25→    <>
    26→      <OrderSummaryContainer>
    27→        <StyledHeading level={3} $withMargin>
    28→          Your order
    29→        </StyledHeading>
    30→        <CartItemsContainer>
    31→          {cartItems.length > 0 ? (
    32→            cartItems.map((item) => <ShoppingCartItem key={item.id} item={item} />)
    33→          ) : (
    34→            <Body>Your cart is empty.</Body>
    35→          )}
    36→        </CartItemsContainer>
    37→        <BottomContainer>
    38→          <Body>Total</Body>
    39→          <StyledHeading level={2}>{toCurrency(totalPrice)}</StyledHeading>
    40→        </BottomContainer>

Now the RestaurantDetailPage story uses a decorator with its own MemoryRouter, but preview also wraps in MemoryRouter. This will cause a nested router issue. I need to think about this differently - the preview should provide the MemoryRouter, but page stories that need route params need their own routing setup. Let me update the preview to not include MemoryRouter, and instead have each story that needs it wrap it themselves. Actually, most components don't need routing but some use `<Link>` which needs a Router. Let me keep the MemoryRouter in preview and use `reactRouter` parameter or just override the decorator for the RestaurantDetailPage.

Actually, React Router v7 allows nested routers or at least MemoryRouter wrapping should be fine. Let me just try running the tests now and see what happens.

content.text: As expected - nested Router issue. I need to override the decorator for the RestaurantDetailPage to replace the MemoryRouter from preview rather than nest it. Let me update the story to use a different approach.

content.content: The file /Users/yannbraga/open-source/storybook-eval/trials/2026-05-05T21-16-37Z-cb8e3629/project/src/pages/RestaurantDetailPage/RestaurantDetailPage.stories.tsx has been updated successfully.

content.text:
Wait, `useGlobalDecorators: false` is not a real Storybook parameter. The issue is that the preview decorator adds MemoryRouter and then the story-level decorator adds another one. I need a different approach. Let me check how Storybook handles this - the story-level decorators run first (inner), then the preview decorators wrap around them (outer). So the preview MemoryRouter wraps the story's MemoryRouter, causing nesting.

The cleanest solution is to remove MemoryRouter from the global preview decorator and instead add it per-story where needed, or better yet, keep it in preview but for pages that need route params, I should use a different pattern.

Actually, the simplest approach: For the RestaurantDetailPage, I can avoid using `useParams` by not using it directly in the story. But the component itself calls `useParams`. Let me think...

The best approach is to keep the MemoryRouter in the preview decorator but for stories that need specific routes, I should use `createMemoryRouter` and `RouterProvider` instead of `MemoryRouter` + `Routes`. But that would still nest.

Actually, let me just check if there's a way to override decorators. In Storybook, if a story provides its own decorators, they run inside the global decorators - there's no way to "skip" the global ones. So the solution is to not put MemoryRouter in the global preview and add it to stories that need it, OR to keep it global and not add it again in the RestaurantDetailPage story.

For the RestaurantDetailPage, the issue is it uses `useParams`. I can wrap it differently - provide routes through the existing global MemoryRouter. Let me restructure:

All done. Here's a summary of what was set up:

**Preview setup** (`.storybook/preview.tsx`):
- `MemoryRouter` for React Router (with configurable `initialEntries` parameter)
- Redux `StoreProvider` with the app's store
- `ThemeProvider` with `lightTheme` from styled-components
- `GlobalStyle` for global CSS (fonts, resets, etc.)
- Portal root `<div id="modal" />` for modals
- MSW integration via `msw-storybook-addon` with `mswLoader`

**MSW handlers** (`.storybook/msw-handlers.ts`):
- Handles all 3 API patterns: `getRestaurants`, `getRestaurantById`, `getRestaurantsByCategory`
- Returns deterministic mock data based on the app's stub data

**Main config** (`.storybook/main.ts`):
- Added `staticDirs: ['../public']` so `mockServiceWorker.js` is served

**10 story files created** (41 total tests, all passing):

| File | Stories | Coverage |
|------|---------|----------|
| `Button/Button.stories.tsx` | 6 (Default, Clear, WithIcon, Disabled, Large, **CssCheck**) | Low-level UI, CSS verification |
| `Badge/Badge.stories.tsx` | 3 | Simple presentational |
| `RestaurantCard/RestaurantCard.stories.tsx` | 5 (Default, New, Closed, Loading, NoRating) | Core card with all states |
| `Category/Category.stories.tsx` | 3 (Squared, Rounded, Sushi) | Layout variants |
| `Review/Review.stories.tsx` | 4 (Excellent, VeryGood, Adequate, NoReviews) | Rating logic |
| `TopBanner/TopBanner.stories.tsx` | 3 | Banner with/without photo |
| `Header/Header.stories.tsx` | 3 (Default, LogoOnly, WithCartItems) | Header with cart state |
| `Footer/Footer.stories.tsx` | 1 | Static footer |
| `forms/Input.stories.tsx` | 3 (Default, WithError, Filled) | Form interaction |
| `HomePage/HomePage.stories.tsx` | 1 | Full page with MSW data fetch |
| `RestaurantDetailPage/RestaurantDetailPage.stories.tsx` | 1 | Page with route params + MSW |

1→import useDarkMode from 'use-dark-mode'
     2→import { ThemeProvider } from 'styled-components'
     3→import { BrowserRouter as Router } from 'react-router-dom'
     4→import { Provider as StoreProvider } from 'react-redux'
     5→
     6→import { store } from './app-state'
     7→import { AppRoutes } from './Routes'
     8→import { lightTheme, darkTheme } from './styles/theme'
     9→import { GlobalStyle } from './styles/GlobalStyle'
    10→
    11→export default function App() {
    12→  const { value } = useDarkMode(false, { global: globalThis.window })
    13→  const theme = value ? darkTheme : lightTheme
    14→
    15→  return (
    16→    <Router>
    17→      <StoreProvider store={store}>
    18→        <ThemeProvider theme={theme}>
    19→          <GlobalStyle />
    20→          <AppRoutes />
    21→        </ThemeProvider>
    22→      </StoreProvider>
    23→    </Router>
    24→  )
    25→}
    26→

1→import { useLayoutEffect } from 'react'
     2→import { Routes, Route, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→
     4→import { CategoryListPage } from './pages/CategoryListPage'
     5→import { CategoryDetailPage } from './pages/CategoryDetailPage'
     6→import { RestaurantDetailPage } from './pages/RestaurantDetailPage'
     7→import { HomePage } from './pages/HomePage'
     8→import { CheckoutPage } from './pages/CheckoutPage'
     9→import { SuccessPage } from './pages/SuccessPage'
    10→
    11→export const AppRoutes: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<unknown>> = ({ children }) => {
    12→  const location = useLocation()
    13→  // Scroll to top when a path changes
    14→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    15→    window.scrollTo(0, 0)
    16→  }, [location.pathname])
    17→
    18→  return (
    19→    <>
    20→      <div id="modal" />
    21→      <Routes>
    22→        <Route path="/categories" element={<CategoryListPage />} />
    23→        <Route path="/categories/:id" element={<CategoryDetailPage />} />
    24→        <Route path="/restaurants/:id" element={<RestaurantDetailPage />} />
    25→        <Route path="/checkout" element={<CheckoutPage />} />
    26→        <Route path="/success" element={<SuccessPage />} />
    27→        <Route path="/" element={<HomePage />} />
    28→        {children}
    29→      </Routes>
    30→    </>
    31→  )
    32→}

1→import { combineReducers, configureStore } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'
     2→
     3→import { reducer as cart } from './cart'
     4→import { reducer as order } from './order'
     5→
     6→export const rootReducer = combineReducers({
     7→  cart,
     8→  order,
     9→})
    10→
    11→export const store = configureStore({
    12→  reducer: rootReducer,
    13→})
    14→
    15→export type AppDispatch = typeof store.dispatch
    16→export type RootState = ReturnType<typeof store.getState>
    17→

1→import { TypedUseSelectorHook, useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux'
     2→
     3→import { AppDispatch, RootState } from './store'
     4→
     5→/**
     6→ * The reason we expose our own dispatch and selector
     7→ * is that we get typescript safety anywhere, which is
     8→ * automatically updated as we add more slices to the application.
     9→ */
    10→
    11→export const useAppDispatch = () => useDispatch<AppDispatch>()
    12→export const useAppSelector: TypedUseSelectorHook<RootState> = useSelector
    13→

1→import styled from 'styled-components'
     2→import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→import Carousel, { type ArrowProps, type CarouselProps } from 'react-multi-carousel'
     4→
     5→import { useFetchRestaurants } from '../../../../api/hooks'
     6→import { IconButton } from '../../../../components/IconButton'
     7→import { PageSection } from '../../../../components/PageSection'
     8→import { RestaurantCard, RestaurantCardSkeleton } from '../../../../components/RestaurantCard'
     9→import { Restaurant } from '../../../../types'
    10→import { isMobile } from '../../../../helpers'
    11→
    12→const PreviousButton = styled(IconButton)`
    13→  position: absolute;
    14→  left: 0;
    15→`
    16→
    17→const NextButton = styled(IconButton)`
    18→  position: absolute;
    19→  right: 0;
    20→`
    21→
    22→type RestaurantsSectionProps = {
    23→  title: string
    24→}
    25→
    26→const CustomArrow = (props: Partial<CarouselProps & ArrowProps> & { isNext?: boolean }) => {
    27→  // filter out unnecessary props coming from react-multi-carousel
    28→  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars
    29→  const { carouselState, rtl, isNext, ...rest } = props
    30→  return isNext ? (
    31→    <NextButton name="arrow-right" {...rest} />
    32→  ) : (
    33→    <PreviousButton name="arrow-left" {...rest} />
    34→  )
    35→}
    36→
    37→export const RestaurantsSection = ({ title }: RestaurantsSectionProps) => {
    38→  const navigate = useNavigate()
    39→
    40→  const { restaurants, status } = useFetchRestaurants()
    41→
    42→  const isOnMobile = isMobile()
    43→  return (
    44→    <PageSection title={title}>
    45→      <Carousel
    46→        draggable={isOnMobile}
    47→        partialVisible={isOnMobile}
    48→        customLeftArrow={<CustomArrow />}
    49→        customRightArrow={<CustomArrow isNext />}
    50→        responsive={{
    51→          desktop: {
    52→            breakpoint: { max: 5000, min: 1024 },
    53→            items: 3,
    54→            slidesToSlide: 3,
    55→          },
    56→          tablet: {
    57→            breakpoint: { max: 1024, min: 464 },
    58→            items: 2,
    59→            paritialVisibilityGutter: 50,
    60→          },
    61→          mobile: {
    62→            breakpoint: { max: 464, min: 0 },
    63→            items: 1,
    64→            paritialVisibilityGutter: 30,
    65→          },
    66→        }}
    67→        containerClass="carousel-container"
    68→        removeArrowOnDeviceType={['tablet', 'mobile']}
    69→        itemClass="carousel-item"
    70→      >
    71→        {status === 'loading'
    72→          ? Array.from({ length: 3 }).map((_, index) => <RestaurantCardSkeleton key={index} />)
    73→          : restaurants.map((restaurant: Restaurant, index: number) => (
    74→              <RestaurantCard
    75→                key={restaurant.name + index}
    76→                {...restaurant}
    77→                onClick={() => navigate(`/restaurants/${restaurant.id}`)}
    78→              />
    79→            ))}
    80→      </Carousel>
    81→    </PageSection>
    82→  )
    83→}

1→import * as React from 'react'

    11→type ModalProps = {
    12→  isOpen: boolean
    13→  onClose: () => void

    16→export const Modal: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<ModalProps>> = ({
    17→  children,
    18→  isOpen,
    19→  onClose,
    20→}) => {
    21→  useKey('escape', onClose)
    22→  useLockBodyScroll(isOpen)
    23→  const contentRef = React.useRef(null)
    24→  const backdropRef = React.useRef(null)
    25→
    26→  return (
    27→    <Portal selector="#modal">
    28→      <CSSTransition
    29→        in={isOpen}

    34→      >
    35→        <ModalContent data-testid="modal" ref={contentRef}>
    36→          <TopBar>
    37→            <Button
    38→              data-testid="modal-close-btn"
    39→              onClick={onClose}
    40→              clear
    41→              round
    42→              icon="cross"
    43→              aria-label="close modal"
    44→              iconSize={16}
    45→            />
    46→          </TopBar>
    47→          {children}
    48→        </ModalContent>
    49→      </CSSTransition>
    50→
    51→      <CSSTransition
    52→        in={isOpen}
    53→        timeout={300}
    54→        classNames="backdrop"
    55→        unmountOnExit
    56→        nodeRef={backdropRef}
    57→      >
    58→        <Backdrop data-testid="modal-backdrop" ref={backdropRef} onClick={onClose} />
    59→      </CSSTransition>
    60→    </Portal>
    61→  )
    62→}

    13→  ({ $size, $fontWeight, color: textColor, theme: { typography, color } }) => css`
    14→    display: block;
    15→    font-family: 'Hind';
    16→    color: ${textColor || color.primaryText};
    17→    font-weight: ${typography.fontWeight[$fontWeight as FontWeight]};
    18→    font-size: ${typography.fontSize[`body${$size}` as FontSize]};
    19→  `
    20→)
    21→
    22→type AsElement = 'span' | 'p' | 'label' | 'figcaption'
    23→
    24→type ElementProps<T extends AsElement> = T extends 'label'
    25→  ? React.LabelHTMLAttributes<HTMLLabelElement>
    26→  : T extends 'span'
    27→    ? React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement>
    28→    : T extends 'p'
    29→      ? React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>
    30→      : React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>
    31→
    32→type DefaultProps = {
    33→  className?: string
    34→  size?: 'S' | 'XS' | 'XXS'
    35→  fontWeight?: 'regular' | 'medium' | 'bold' | 'black'
    36→  type?: AsElement
    37→  color?: string
    38→  children: React.ReactNode | string
    39→}
    40→
    41→type BodyProps = DefaultProps & ElementProps<AsElement>
    42→
    43→export const Body: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<BodyProps>> = ({
    44→  size = '',
    45→  fontWeight = 'regular',
    46→  type = 'p',
    47→  color,
    48→  children,
    49→  className,
    50→  ...props
    51→}) => (
    52→  <BodyBase
    53→    as={type}
    54→    $size={size}
    55→    $fontWeight={fontWeight}
    56→    color={color}
    57→    className={className}
    58→    {...props}
    59→  >
    60→    {children}
    61→  </BodyBase>
    62→)
    63→

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→export const useKey = (key: string, keyDownCb = () => {}, keyUpCb = () => {}): boolean => {
     4→  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false)
     5→  const match = useCallback((event: any) => key.toLowerCase() === event.key.toLowerCase(), [key])
     6→
     7→  const onKeyDown = useCallback(
     8→    (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
     9→      if (match(event)) {
    10→        setPressed(true)
    11→        keyDownCb()
    12→      }
    13→    },
    14→    [keyDownCb, match]
    15→  )
    16→
    17→  const onKeyUp = useCallback(
    18→    (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
    19→      if (match(event)) {
    20→        setPressed(false)
    21→        keyUpCb()
    22→      }
    23→    },
    24→    [keyUpCb, match]
    25→  )
    26→
    27→  useEffect(() => {
    28→    globalThis.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    29→    globalThis.addEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp)
    30→
    31→    return () => {
    32→      globalThis.removeEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    33→      globalThis.removeEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp)
    34→    }
    35→  }, [key, onKeyDown, onKeyUp])
    36→
    37→  return pressed
    38→}
    39→

     5→export type OrderState = {

    12→
    13→const clearOrder: CaseReducer<OrderState> = (state) => {

    26→    clearOrderAction: clearOrder,
    27→  },
    28→})
    29→
    30→// Extract the action creators object and the reducer
    31→export const { actions, reducer } = orderSlice

    33→// Extract and export each action creator by name

    36→// Export the reducer, either as a default or named export

content.text:
Perfect! Now let me compile all the information into a comprehensive report.

## Comprehensive Codebase Overview

I've thoroughly explored the codebase and here's a complete understanding of all components, pages, hooks, and state management:

---

### **PAGE COMPONENTS** (in `/src/pages/`)

#### **1. HomePage**
- **Files**: `index.tsx`, `HomePage.tsx`
- **Props**: None (container component)
- **Renders**: `PageTemplate` with Banner, RestaurantsSection, AwardWinningSection, CategoriesSection
- **Key Features**: Home page layout with sections

#### **2. CategoryListPage**
- **Files**: `index.tsx`, `CategoryListPage.tsx`
- **Props**: None (uses router params)
- **Renders**: List of categories from `/stub/categories`
- **Components Used**: `TopBanner`, `CategoryList`, typography

#### **3. CategoryDetailPage**
- **Files**: `index.tsx`, `CategoryDetailPage.tsx`
- **Props**: None (uses `useParams` for category id)
- **Renders**: Restaurant cards filtered by category using `useFetchRestaurantsByCategory` hook
- **State**: Uses Redux for cart management
- **Features**: Breadcrumb, error handling, loading skeletons

#### **4. RestaurantDetailPage**
- **Files**: `index.tsx`, `RestaurantDetailPage.tsx`
- **Props**: None (uses router params for restaurant id)
- **Renders**: Restaurant details with food sections (FoodItem, Dessert, Drinks)
- **State Management**: Redux cart (add/remove items)
- **Modal**: `FoodItemModal` for quantity selection
- **Error States**: 404, 500 error handling

#### **5. CheckoutPage**
- **Files**: `index.tsx`, `CheckoutPage.tsx`
- **Props**: None
- **Renders**: `MultiStepForm` + `OrderSummary`
- **Features**: Two-column layout with form on left, order summary on right

#### **6. SuccessPage**
- **Files**: `index.tsx`, `SuccessPage.tsx`
- **Props**: None (uses Redux `selectOrderItems`)
- **Renders**: Order confirmation with estimated delivery time and order summary

---

### **CORE COMPONENTS** (in `/src/components/`)

#### **Button**
```tsx
Props:
  - clear?: boolean (transparent style)
  - round?: boolean (fully rounded)
  - large?: boolean (larger padding)
  - icon?: IconName (renders icon)
  - iconSize?: number
  - disabled?: boolean
  - onClick?: () => void
  - children?: string | ReactNode
```

#### **Badge**
```tsx
Props:
  - text: string (required)
  - className?: string
```

#### **Modal**
```tsx
Props:
  - isOpen: boolean (required)
  - onClose: () => void (required)
  - children: ReactNode
Uses: Portal, CSSTransition, keyboard (escape key)
```

#### **Sidebar**
```tsx
Props:
  - isOpen: boolean (required)
  - title: string (required)
  - onClose: () => void (required)
  - footer?: ReactNode
Features: Escape key support, body scroll lock
```

#### **Header**
- **Two Implementations**:
  1. `HeaderComponent` (presentational) - takes all props
  2. `Header` (container) - connects to Redux, handles navigation
```tsx
Props:
  - isCartVisible?: boolean
  - cartItems?: CartItem[]
  - totalPrice?: number
  - logoOnly?: boolean
  - sticky?: boolean
  - toggleCartVisibility?: () => void
  - goToCheckout?: () => void
  - saveItem?: (item: CartItem) => void
```

#### **Footer**
- Static footer with links, social media, app store badges

#### **RestaurantCard**
```tsx
Props:
  - name: string (required)
  - specialty: string (required)
  - photoUrl: string (required)
  - rating?: number
  - categories?: string[]
  - isClosed?: boolean
  - isNew?: boolean
  - onClick?: () => void
  - className?: string
Includes: RestaurantCardSkeleton for loading
```

#### **Category**
```tsx
Props:
  - title: string (required)
  - photoUrl: string (required)
  - id?: string
  - round?: boolean (changes layout - circular vs square)
```

#### **TopBanner**
```tsx
Props:
  - title?: string
  - photoUrl?: string (background image)
  - onBackClick?: () => void (currently commented out)
```

#### **ShoppingCart Components**
- **OrderSummary**: Displays cart items total
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - cartItems: CartItem[]
  ```
- **ShoppingCartItem**: Individual cart line item
- **ShoppingCartMenu**: Sidebar with cart items and checkout button
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - isOpen: boolean
    - totalPrice: number
    - onClose: () => void
    - cartItems: CartItem[]
    - onGoToCheckoutClick?: () => void
    - onItemChange: (item: any) => void
  ```

#### **Breadcrumb**
```tsx
Props:
  - items: Array<{ label: string, path?: string }>
```

#### **Review**
```tsx
Props:
  - rating?: number
Shows: Star rating with text (Very poor -> Excellent)
```

#### **Typography**
- **Heading**:
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - level?: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 (maps to h1-h5)
    - className?: string
    - children: ReactNode
  ```
- **Body**:
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - type?: 'span' | 'p' | 'label' | 'figcaption'
    - size?: 'S' | 'XS' | 'XXS'
    - fontWeight?: 'regular' | 'medium' | 'bold' | 'black'
    - color?: string
    - className?: string
    - children: ReactNode | string
  ```

#### **Forms**
- **Input**:
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - label?: string
    - value?: any
    - onChange?: (data: any) => void
    - error?: string
    - [HTMLInputAttributes]
  ```
- **Select**:
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - label?: string
    - options: any[] (required)
    - value?: any
    - onChange?: (data: any) => void
    - [HTMLSelectAttributes]
  ```

#### **Other Components**
- **PageSection**: Section with title and optional top button
- **Spinner**: Loading spinner
- **Logo**: Animated food logo with optional text "MealDrop"
- **ErrorBlock**: Error message with image and action button
- **AnimatedIllustration**: Loads Lottie animations (NotFound, Error)
- **IconButton**: Circular button with icon
- **Icon**: SVG icon renderer (uses sprite map)
- **FooterCard**: Card for footer with title and links
- **Portal**: React portal component for modals/sidebars

---

### **PAGE-SPECIFIC COMPONENTS**

#### **HomePage Sections**
- **Banner**: Hero section with "Hungry?" CTA
- **RestaurantsSection**: Carousel of restaurant cards
- **CategoriesSection**: Carousel of category cards
- **AwardWinningSection**: Award winning restaurants promo

#### **RestaurantDetailPage Components**
- **FoodItem**: Individual menu item card
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - name: string
    - price: number
    - description?: string
    - quantity?: number
    - onClick: () => void
  ```
- **FoodSection**: Grid of food items by category
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - title: string
    - items: FoodMenuItem[]
    - cartItems: CartItem[]
    - onItemClick?: (item: CartItem) => void
  ```
- **FoodItemModal**: Modal for selecting food quantity
  ```tsx
  Props:
    - item?: CartItem
    - cartItems: CartItem[]
    - onClose: () => void
    - onItemSave: (item: CartItem) => void
    - onItemRemove: (item: CartItem) => void
  ```

#### **CheckoutPage Components**
- **MultiStepForm**: Multi-step checkout form
- **StepIndicator**: Shows current checkout step
- **ContactDetails**: Email/phone form
- **DeliveryDetails**: Address form
- **Validation**: Form validation logic

#### **CategoryListPage Components**
- **CategoryList**: Grid of all categories

---

### **HOOKS** (in `/src/hooks/`)

```tsx
export const useKey = (key: string, keyDownCb?: () => {}, keyUpCb?: () => {}): boolean
// Detects keyboard press, used for Escape key handling

export const useLockBodyScroll = (shouldLock?: boolean): void
// Locks/unlocks body scroll when modals/sidebars open
```

---

### **TYPES** (in `/src/types/index.ts`)

```tsx
export type ShopItem = {
  id: number
  name: string
  price: number
  imageUrl?: string
  description?: string
}

export type FoodMenuItem = {
  id: number
  name: string
  description?: string
  price: number
}

export type Restaurant = {
  name: string
  id?: string
  mapsUrl?: string
  rating?: number
  url?: string
  address?: string
  specialty: string
  photoUrl: string
  isClosed?: boolean
  categories?: string[]
  isLoading?: boolean
  isNew?: boolean
  menu: {
    food: FoodMenuItem[]
    dessert: FoodMenuItem[]
    drinks: FoodMenuItem[]
  }
}
```

---

### **STATE MANAGEMENT** (Redux in `/src/app-state/`)

#### **Cart Slice** (`cart/cart.ts`)
```tsx
export interface CartItem extends ShopItem {
  quantity: number
}

export type CartState = {
  visible: boolean
  items: CartItem[]
}

Actions:
- toggleVisibilityAction()
- saveItemAction(item: CartItem)
- clearItemAction(item: CartItem)
- removeItemAction(item: CartItem)
- clearCartAction()
```

#### **Cart Selectors** (`cart/selectors.ts`)
```tsx
selectCartVisibility: boolean
selectCartItems: CartItem[]
selectCartItemsCount: number
selectCartTotal: number
```

#### **Order Slice** (`order/order.ts`)
```tsx
export type OrderState = {
  items: CartItem[]
}

Actions:
- saveOrderAction(items: CartItem[])
- clearOrderAction()
```

#### **Order Selectors** (`order/selectors.ts`)
```tsx
selectOrderItems: CartItem[]
selectOrderTotal: number
```

#### **App Hooks** (`hooks.ts`)
```tsx
export const useAppDispatch = () => useDispatch<AppDispatch>()
export const useAppSelector: TypedUseSelectorHook<RootState> = useSelector
```

---

### **EXISTING STORY FILES**

Located in `/src/stories/`:
- **Button.stories.ts**: Example stories for Button component (Primary, Secondary, Large, Small variants)
- **Header.stories.ts**: Example stories for Header (LoggedIn, LoggedOut)
- **Page.stories.ts**: Example stories for Page component with interaction testing

These use Storybook v7+ format with:
- Meta export with title, component, tags, parameters
- Story exports as named constants
- fn() spy wrapper for event handlers
- play() function for interaction testing

---

### **COMPONENT STRUCTURE SUMMARY**

**Total Components**: 40+ components across the application

**Key Patterns**:
1. Most components have both `Component.tsx` and `index.tsx` exports
2. Styled-components used throughout for styling
3. Memoization used on frequently rendered items (FoodItem, FoodSection)
4. Portal pattern for modals/sidebars
5. Redux for global cart and order state
6. React Router for navigation
7. TypeScript interfaces for all props
8. Keyboard event handling (Escape key)
9. Body scroll locking for overlays
10. Skeleton loading states (RestaurantCardSkeleton)

---

This is the complete architectural understanding of the codebase with all component props, imports, and rendering logic documented.

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import type { Restaurant } from '../types'
     4→
     5→import { api } from './index'
     6→
     7→export const useFetchRestaurants = () => {
     8→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
     9→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    10→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    11→
    12→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    13→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    14→  }, [setRetry])
    15→
    16→  useEffect(() => {
    17→    setStatus('loading')
    18→
    19→    api
    20→      .getRestaurants()
    21→      .then((res) => {
    22→        setStatus('success')
    23→        setRestaurants(res)
    24→      })
    25→      .catch((error) => {
    26→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    27→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    28→      })
    29→  }, [retry])
    30→
    31→  return {
    32→    status,
    33→    restaurants,
    34→    retryRequest,
    35→  }
    36→}
    37→
    38→export const useFetchRestaurantsByCategory = (categoryId?: string) => {
    39→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    40→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    41→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    42→
    43→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    44→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    45→  }, [setRetry])
    46→
    47→  useEffect(() => {
    48→    if (categoryId) {
    49→      setStatus('loading')
    50→
    51→      api
    52→        .getRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId)
    53→        .then((res) => {
    54→          setStatus('success')
    55→          setRestaurants(res)
    56→        })
    57→        .catch((error) => {
    58→          const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    59→          setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    60→        })
    61→    }
    62→  }, [categoryId, retry])
    63→
    64→  return {
    65→    status,
    66→    restaurants,
    67→    retryRequest,
    68→  }
    69→}
    70→
    71→export const useFetchRestaurant = (id: string) => {
    72→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    73→  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant>()
    74→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    75→
    76→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    77→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    78→  }, [setRetry])
    79→
    80→  useEffect(() => {
    81→    setStatus('loading')
    82→
    83→    api
    84→      .getRestaurantById(id)
    85→      .then((res) => {
    86→        setStatus('success')
    87→        setRestaurant(res)
    88→      })
    89→      .catch((error) => {
    90→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    91→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    92→      })
    93→  }, [id, retry])
    94→
    95→  return {
    96→    status,
    97→    restaurant,
    98→    retryRequest,
    99→  }
   100→}

1→import styled from 'styled-components'
     2→import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→import Carousel, { type ArrowProps, type CarouselProps } from 'react-multi-carousel'
     4→
     5→import { useFetchRestaurants } from '../../../../api/hooks'
     6→import { IconButton } from '../../../../components/IconButton'
     7→import { PageSection } from '../../../../components/PageSection'
     8→import { RestaurantCard, RestaurantCardSkeleton } from '../../../../components/RestaurantCard'
     9→import { Restaurant } from '../../../../types'
    10→import { isMobile } from '../../../../helpers'
    11→
    12→const PreviousButton = styled(IconButton)`
    13→  position: absolute;
    14→  left: 0;
    15→`
    16→
    17→const NextButton = styled(IconButton)`
    18→  position: absolute;
    19→  right: 0;
    20→`
    21→
    22→type RestaurantsSectionProps = {
    23→  title: string
    24→}
    25→
    26→const CustomArrow = (props: Partial<CarouselProps & ArrowProps> & { isNext?: boolean }) => {
    27→  // filter out unnecessary props coming from react-multi-carousel
    28→  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars
    29→  const { carouselState, rtl, isNext, ...rest } = props
    30→  return isNext ? (
    31→    <NextButton name="arrow-right" {...rest} />
    32→  ) : (
    33→    <PreviousButton name="arrow-left" {...rest} />
    34→  )
    35→}
    36→
    37→export const RestaurantsSection = ({ title }: RestaurantsSectionProps) => {
    38→  const navigate = useNavigate()
    39→
    40→  const { restaurants, status } = useFetchRestaurants()
    41→
    42→  const isOnMobile = isMobile()
    43→  return (
    44→    <PageSection title={title}>
    45→      <Carousel
    46→        draggable={isOnMobile}
    47→        partialVisible={isOnMobile}
    48→        customLeftArrow={<CustomArrow />}
    49→        customRightArrow={<CustomArrow isNext />}
    50→        responsive={{
    51→          desktop: {
    52→            breakpoint: { max: 5000, min: 1024 },
    53→            items: 3,
    54→            slidesToSlide: 3,
    55→          },
    56→          tablet: {
    57→            breakpoint: { max: 1024, min: 464 },
    58→            items: 2,
    59→            paritialVisibilityGutter: 50,
    60→          },
    61→          mobile: {
    62→            breakpoint: { max: 464, min: 0 },
    63→            items: 1,
    64→            paritialVisibilityGutter: 30,
    65→          },
    66→        }}
    67→        containerClass="carousel-container"
    68→        removeArrowOnDeviceType={['tablet', 'mobile']}
    69→        itemClass="carousel-item"
    70→      >
    71→        {status === 'loading'
    72→          ? Array.from({ length: 3 }).map((_, index) => <RestaurantCardSkeleton key={index} />)
    73→          : restaurants.map((restaurant: Restaurant, index: number) => (
    74→              <RestaurantCard
    75→                key={restaurant.name + index}
    76→                {...restaurant}
    77→                onClick={() => navigate(`/restaurants/${restaurant.id}`)}
    78→              />
    79→            ))}
    80→      </Carousel>
    81→    </PageSection>
    82→  )
    83→}
    84→
